description: With top notes of black currant, red currant and pear, middle notes of iris, rose and peony, and base notes of musk, sandalwood and vanilla, the Wings fragrance for women from police is classed as a floral green.Quantity: 75 ml CautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
